reason: Mechanism atom output evaluated against atom contract and golden output.

parsed_output.selected_claim: Harness improves absolute contract adherence and enables weak models on mechanism-bound tasks.

decision_trace.step: Evidence e01 explicitly supports C2 by demonstrating weak-model task success improvement (G8/G9) in Stage7p v2, aligning with 'enables weak models on mechanism-bound tasks'.
Evidence e02 rejects C1's universal gap closure claim, as gap compression is not universal across all tasks.
